description: CData provides connectivity software and cloud services that let users access, virtualize, and integrate data from many SaaS applications, databases, and APIs. Its Connect AI product offers a managed layer for querying and acting on connected data through REST, OData, OpenAPI, and MCP.
summary: CData Connect AI exposes authenticated developer surfaces for REST, OData, workspace-specific OpenAPI export, and two remote MCP servers (data and management); docs also mention a CLI, but no first-party CLI command/package/auth details were publicly documented on cdata.com pages reviewed.
